date.description: Date these events occurred in ISO 8601 format.

logins.description: Number of logins on this date.

signups.description: Number of signups on this date.

leaked_passwords.description: Number of breached-password detections on this date (subscription required).

updated_at.description: Date and time this stats entry was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

created_at.description: Approximate date and time the first event occurred in ISO 8601 format.
